faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Free AI Video Generator — Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have more questions about our free AI video generator? Contact us via Discord or Email.

items.title: Is this AI video generator really free?
items.description: Yes. When you sign up, you receive free credits that you can use immediately to generate AI videos. No credit card is required to start. Your free credits let you explore text-to-video and image-to-video AI video generation.

items.title: How many free credits do I get when I sign up?
items.description: New users receive free credits automatically upon registration. The exact amount is shown on the sign-up page. These free credits can be used across all AI video generation features.

items.title: How do I generate the best AI videos from text?
items.description: For the best results with our free AI video generator, be specific in your prompts. Include details about the subject, setting, art style (e.g., 'cinematic', 'anime'), camera angle, and mood. The more descriptive your prompt, the better the AI video output.

items.title: Can I use an image to generate a free AI video?
items.description: Yes. Sign up for a free account, go to the Image to Video tool, upload your photo, and choose an animation style. Your free sign-up credits cover image-to-video AI generation with no watermark.

items.title: What makes this the best free AI video generator?
items.description: Our free AI video generator stands out for cinematic quality, precise prompt control, and character consistency. Unlike other tools, we offer advanced style customization and HD output — all accessible with your free sign-up credits.

items.title: Does the Image to Video AI feature work with any photo?
items.description: For best results, use clear, high-resolution images. Our free AI video generator performs best when subjects are well-defined. Supported formats include JPG, PNG, and HEIC.

items.title: What AI video models does this free AI video generator support?
items.description: Our free AI video generator supports multiple leading AI video models including Seedance 2.0, Wan 2.7 Video, Kling 3.0, and HappyHorse 1.0. Each model offers unique strengths for text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

items.title: Can I use the AI video generator for commercial projects?
items.description: Yes. All AI-generated videos from our free AI video generator are cleared for commercial use. Export watermark-free HD masters — even on the free plan with your sign-up credits.
